title: Chinese chains Luckin Coffee and Mixue are coming for U.S. customers, because U.S. companies taught them how
summary: Last week, I whooshed into a Luckin coffee shop in Lower Manhattan, snatched my mobile order off the counter, and was back on the street within eight seconds—as if I’d run upstairs to grab my keys. title: Michael Anastassiades closes lighting brand to refocus on design full time
summary: Designer Michael Anastassiades has announced the closure of his eponymous lighting brand after 20 years in business, telling Dezeen he plans to dedicate his newfound free time "solely to creating things".
